caribbean.headline: Heavy Rain and Moderate Winds Impact St Thomas Today
caribbean.paragraph: St Thomas is experiencing moderate east-southeast winds at 21 kt with wave heights reaching 5.3 ft and a swell period of 6 seconds. Rain probability is high at 80%, creating wet conditions for mariners and port operations, while Barbados sees lighter winds near 15 kt and less intense weather.

mediterranean.headline: Heavy Rain and Moderate Winds Impact Dubrovnik Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Dubrovnik is experiencing strong weather with sustained winds up to 18 kt and wave heights reaching 5.3 ft from the SSW, accompanied by a 100% rain probability. Naples reports lighter conditions with winds at 14 kt and less than 10% rain probability, making Dubrovnik the primary concern for maritime operations in the Central Mediterranean.
